jd:
We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our growing team.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive, accessible web interfaces using React and TypeScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UI from Figma designs
- Optimize application performance using code splitting, lazy loading, and caching strategies
- Write unit and integration tests using Jest and React Testing Library
- Maintain and improve our component library built on Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience with React.js and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
- Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and Tailwind CSS
- Experience with state management (Redux Toolkit or Zustand)
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and GraphQL
- Knowledge of Git version control and CI/CD pipelines
- Experience with Vite or Webpack build tools
- Bonus: TypeScript, Next.js, Framer Motion, WebSockets

Join us as a Backend Developer to build scalable APIs and services.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and Express
- Build and maintain microservices with Docker and Kubernetes
- Optimize database queries in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis
- Implement authentication and authorization using JWT and OAuth2
- Write comprehensive unit and integration tests with Jest and Supertest
- Monitor application health and performance using Datadog and Sentry

Requirements:
- 2+ years backend development experience with Node.js or Python
- Strong knowledge of Express.js or FastAPI
- Proficiency with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB)
- Experience with caching strategies using Redis
- Familiarity with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka)
- Understanding of Docker, container orchestration, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)
- Knowledge of REST API design principles and security best practices
- Bonus: Microservices architecture, Terraform, WebSockets

We're hiring a Full Stack Developer to own features end-to-end.

Responsibilities:
- Develop full-stack features using React on the frontend and Node.js/Express on the backend
- Design MongoDB schemas and optimize queries for performance at scale
- Integrate third-party APIs including Stripe, Twilio, and Google Maps
- Deploy applications on Vercel, Render, and AWS with CI/CD pipelines
- Implement real-time features using WebSockets and Socket.IO
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical architecture decisions

Requirements:
- 2+ years experience with MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Experience with Tailwind CSS and component libraries (shadcn/ui, Material UI)
- Familiarity with Redux Toolkit or React Query for state/data management
- Knowledge of JWT authentication and session management
- Version control with Git and collaborative workflows (GitHub, GitLab)
- Bonus: Next.js, Supabase, Docker, GraphQL, Stripe integration

We are seeking a DevOps Engineer to streamline our development and deployment workflows.

Responsibilities:
- Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or CircleCI
- Manage Kubernetes clusters and containerized workloads with Docker
- Provision and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and CloudFormation
- Monitor system reliability and performance with Prometheus, Grafana, and the ELK stack
- Implement security best practices including secrets management and vulnerability scanning
- Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration with Ansible

Requirements:
- 2+ years of DevOps or SRE experience
- Strong proficiency with Docker and Kubernetes (EKS/GKE)
- Hands-on experience with AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, ECS)
- Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code with Terraform or Pulumi
- Scripting skills in Bash and Python
- Experience with monitoring and logging stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)
- Familiarity with GitOps workflows and ArgoCD
- Bonus: Istio service mesh, Helm charts, cost optimization

We are hiring a Data Scientist to derive insights and build ML models.

Responsibilities:
- Build, train, and deploy machine learning models using scikit-learn, XGBoost, and PyTorch
- Perform exploratory data analysis and feature engineering on large datasets
- Develop ETL pipelines for data collection, cleaning, and transformation using pandas and PySpark
- Create dashboards and visualizations with Tableau, Power BI, and Matplotlib
- Collaborate with product teams to translate business problems into analytical solutions
- A/B test product features and analyze experiment results

Requirements:
- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, or related field
- 2+ years of experience in data science or machine learning
- Proficiency in Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow)
- Strong background in statistics, probability, and linear algebra
- Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases
- Familiarity with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI)
- Knowledge of NLP techniques (TF-IDF, embeddings, transformers)
- Bonus: MLOps, LLM fine-tuning, Apache Spark, Airflow

Join our AI team as an ML Engineer to productionize intelligent systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement ML pipelines from data ingestion to model deployment
- Fine-tune and optimize large language models (LLMs) using LoRA and PEFT techniques
- Build model serving infrastructure with FastAPI, TorchServe, and Triton Inference Server
- Implement MLOps practices using MLflow, DVC, and Weights & Biases
- Optimize model inference for latency and throughput using ONNX and TensorRT
- Collaborate with data scientists to transition research models to production

Requirements:
- 2+ years experience in ML engineering or applied research
- Strong Python skills with PyTorch and/or TensorFlow
- Experience with transformer architectures and Hugging Face ecosystem
- Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma)
- Familiarity with RAG pipelines and LLM orchestration (LangChain, LlamaIndex)
- Experience deploying models with Docker and Kubernetes
- Understanding of model evaluation, monitoring, and drift detection
- Bonus: CUDA optimization, distributed training, OpenAI/Anthropic API integration

We're looking for a Product Manager to drive product vision and execution.

Responsibilities:
- Define and own the product roadmap aligned with business objectives and user needs
- Write detailed PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria for engineering teams
- Conduct user research, usability testing, and competitive analysis
- Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, marketing, and sales
- Define KPIs and success metrics; analyze product performance with Mixpanel and Amplitude
- Manage the product backlog and run agile sprint ceremonies in Jira

Requirements:
- 3+ years of product management experience in a B2B or B2C SaaS environment
- Demonstrated ability to ship products end-to-end from ideation to launch
- Strong analytical skills with SQL and BI tools (Looker, Tableau)
- Experience with agile/scrum methodologies
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills
- Ability to prioritize ruthlessly in ambiguous, fast-moving environments
- Familiarity with UX principles and working with Figma
- Bonus: Technical background, growth product experience, AI/ML product exposure

We are searching for a UI/UX Designer to create exceptional user experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Design intuitive, accessible user interfaces for web and mobile applications
- Conduct user research, create personas, and map user journeys
- Produce wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups in Figma
- Build and maintain a scalable design system with reusable components
- Conduct usability testing and iterate based on user feedback and data
- Collaborate closely with frontend developers to ensure design fidelity

Requirements:
- 2+ years of UI/UX design experience for digital products
- Expert proficiency in Figma including auto-layout, components, and variables
- Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
- Understanding of interaction design principles and accessibility (WCAG 2.1)
- Experience with user research methods (interviews, surveys, card sorting)
- Knowledge of design handoff workflows and developer collaboration
- Familiarity with motion design (Lottie, Framer)
- Bonus: HTML/CSS knowledge, Framer prototyping, design tokens

We're hiring an Android Developer to build world-class mobile apps.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain Android applications in Kotlin and Java using Jetpack Compose
- Implement clean architecture patterns (MVVM, MVI) with Hilt dependency injection
- Integrate REST APIs using Retrofit and manage async operations with Kotlin Coroutines
- Implement Room database for local persistence and offline-first capabilities
- Write unit and instrumented tests with JUnit, Mockito, and Espresso
- Publish and maintain apps on Google Play Store including release management

Requirements:
- 2+ years of Android development experience
- Strong proficiency in Kotlin and familiarity with Java
- Experience with Jetpack libraries: Compose, Navigation, ViewModel, LiveData/Flow
- Knowledge of Material Design 3 guidelines
- Familiarity with Firebase (Crashlytics, Analytics, Cloud Messaging)
- Understanding of Android lifecycle, permissions, and background processing
- Experience with Google Play Billing and AdMob integration
- Bonus: KMM, Wear OS, ARCore, NFC integration

Join our security team as a Cybersecurity Analyst to protect our systems.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor security events and incidents using SIEM tools (Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel)
- Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing using Nmap, Metasploit, and Burp Suite
- Perform threat intelligence analysis and develop detection rules
- Investigate and respond to security incidents following NIST and MITRE ATT&CK frameworks
- Implement and audit security policies, access controls, and compliance (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
- Conduct security awareness training for employees

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in cybersecurity, SOC, or information security
- Knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, TLS)
- Experience with SIEM platforms and log analysis
- Familiarity with penetration testing methodologies and tools
- Understanding of cloud security on AWS or Azure
- Scripting skills in Python or Bash for automation
- Relevant certifications: CompTIA Security+, CEH, or CISSP preferred
- Bonus: OSCP, cloud security certifications, malware analysis

We are looking for a QA Engineer to ensure product quality and reliability.

Responsibilities:
- Design and execute manual and automated test cases
- Develop automation scripts using Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright
- Perform API testing using Postman or REST Assured
- Identify, document, and track bugs using Jira or similar tools
- Collaborate with developers to ensure high-quality releases

Requirements:
- 1-3 years of experience in QA or software testing
- Knowledge of testing methodologies and SDLC/STLC
- Experience with automation tools (Selenium, Cypress)
- Familiarity with API testing and debugging
- Basic programming skills in JavaScript, Java, or Python
- Bonus: CI/CD integration, performance testing

We are hiring a Cloud Engineer to build and maintain scalable cloud systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design and deploy cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Automate deployments using Terraform or CloudFormation
- Manage cloud networking, security, and scaling
- Monitor cloud resources and optimize cost
- Implement backup and disaster recovery strategies

Requirements:
- 2+ years of cloud engineering experience
- Strong knowledge of AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Experience with infrastructure-as-code tools
- Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes
- Understanding of networking and security best practices
- Bonus: Multi-cloud architecture, serverless computing

We are looking for a Software Engineer Intern to join our development team.

Responsibilities:
- Assist in developing web and backend applications
- Write clean and maintainable code
- Participate in code reviews and debugging
- Learn and apply best coding practices

Requirements:
- Pursuing a degree in Computer Science or related field
- Basic knowledge of programming (Java, Python, or JavaScript)
- Understanding of data structures and algorithms
- Familiarity with Git
- Eagerness to learn and grow
- Bonus: Personal projects or internships

We are seeking an iOS Developer to build high-quality mobile applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop iOS applications using Swift and UIKit/SwiftUI
- Integrate REST APIs and third-party SDKs
- Maintain code quality and performance
- Collaborate with designers and backend teams

Requirements:
- 2+ years of iOS development experience
- Proficiency in Swift
- Experience with Xcode and iOS frameworks
- Knowledge of app lifecycle and memory management
- Familiarity with Apple App Store deployment
- Bonus: Combine framework, CoreData, ARKit

We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge business needs and technical solutions.

Responsibilities:
- Gather and analyze business requirements
- Create functional specifications and documentation
- Work with stakeholders and development teams
- Conduct data analysis and reporting

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in business analysis
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Experience with SQL and Excel
- Good communication and stakeholder management
- Bonus: Knowledge of Agile methodologies

We are hiring an SRE to ensure system reliability and scalability.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor system performance and uptime
- Automate operations and incident response
- Improve system reliability and scalability
- Work with DevOps and engineering teams

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in SRE/DevOps
- Knowledge of Linux systems and networking
- Experience with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana)
- Scripting skills (Python, Bash)
- Bonus: Kubernetes, cloud platforms

We are looking for a Game Developer to create engaging gaming experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Develop games using Unity or Unreal Engine
- Implement game mechanics and physics
- Optimize game performance
- Collaborate with designers and artists

Requirements:
- 1-3 years of game development experience
- Proficiency in C# or C++
- Experience with Unity or Unreal Engine
- Understanding of game design principles
- Bonus: Multiplayer systems, AR/VR

We are seeking an AI Engineer to build intelligent systems and applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop AI models and integrate them into applications
- Work with NLP, computer vision, or recommendation systems
- Optimize model performance and scalability
- Collaborate with data scientists and engineers

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in AI/ML
- Strong Python skills and ML frameworks
- Knowledge of deep learning and NLP
- Experience with APIs and deployment
- Bonus: LLMs, generative AI, MLOps

We are hiring a Content Writer to create engaging and high-quality content.

Responsibilities:
- Write blogs, articles, and website content
- Conduct research on industry topics
- Optimize content for SEO
- Collaborate with marketing teams

Requirements:
- 1-3 years of content writing experience
- Strong writing and editing skills
- Knowledge of SEO best practices
- Ability to meet deadlines
- Bonus: Technical writing, social media content
